task_description: Audit and improve the KorisPanel codebase: fix deploy script bugs (PANEL_PORT variable never defined), remove unused/dead code packages (gateway, totp, certrotation) and unused functions (logServerError), and clean up redundant deploy diagnostics.

verification.summary: go build ./... clean, go test ./... all pass, go vet ./... no issues, bash -n syntax checks pass for both deploy scripts, no PANEL_PORT references remain, dead code packages removed. Review feedback addressed (subshell isolation, env var honoring).
